purpose: index participates in the dashboards subpage. It renders live swarm state by combining initialization plans, worker progress files, queue/output data, dependency lines, and detail panels without mutating dashboard initialization data from the renderer.
gotchas: Dashboard UI consumes merged initialization plus worker progress; lifecycle state comes from progress files, not mutation of initialization.json after planning.
patterns: Page-directory organization separates high-level page shells from nested component, style, and index modules.
